seoTitle: How to Change T-Shirt Color in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Change the color of a t-shirt design in Canva to preview different apparel variations for your brand or merchandise line.
intro: Seeing a design in multiple shirt colors helps you decide what actually works before committing to production. This guide covers selecting your template and applying color adjustments in Canva. It's useful for small business owners and designers building out an apparel line or promotional merchandise.

steps.heading: Select your t-shirt template
steps.body: Open the mockup or design template featuring the t-shirt you want to edit.

steps.heading: Change the color
steps.body: Use Canva's color tools to adjust the shirt's base color to the shade you want.

steps.heading: Make final adjustments
steps.body: Preview the new color against your design elements to confirm it still looks balanced.

steps.heading: Export your design
steps.body: Download the finished mockup in the new color for marketing or production use.

faq.question: Can I create multiple color variations of the same design?
faq.answer: Yes, duplicating the design and changing the color on each copy is a common way to preview variations.

faq.question: Will changing t-shirt color affect the printed design colors?
faq.answer: The mockup color change is for preview purposes; actual print colors depend on your printing process and supplier.

faq.question: Is this useful for online store listings?
faq.answer: Yes, showing multiple color options is a common way to present apparel variants to customers.
